title: sphaeranthus cotuloides
intro: Sphaeranthus cotuloides, also known as Cape marigold or button bush, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus cotuloides include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
